description: Create a Talon package in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\data_extractor\ to extract COVID-19 statistics. The package must consist of a Python module csv_extractor.py and a command file csv_extractor.talon. The Python module should define a Talon action get_latest_covid_stats(county_name: str) that reads the dataset at C:\workspace\data\us-counties-2020.csv, identifies the most recent entry for the specified county (case-insensitive), and copies a summary to the clipboard using the exact format: As of {date}, {county} County reported {cases} cases and {deaths} deaths. The Talon file must implement the voice command covid stats <user.text> to invoke this action. Use the opened Notepad window to author and save these files.

metadata.expected_string_format: As of {date}, {county} County reported {cases} cases and {deaths} deaths.
